---
title: "Solarized"
description: "A Solarized theme for terminal components."
---

<ComponentPreview name="theme-showcase" theme="solarized" hideCode />

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add @termcn/theme-solarized
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { solarizedTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/solarized";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={solarizedTheme}>
      <Badge variant="info">Solarized</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```
